Put BIMCamel.dll for Navisworks 2025 in this folder.

It MUST be built against the Navisworks 2025 API (Autodesk.Navisworks.Api 22.0.0.0):

    dotnet build BIMCamel\BIMCamel.csproj -c Release ^
        -p:NavisworksDir="C:\Program Files\Autodesk\Navisworks Manage 2025"

Then copy bin\Release\net48\BIMCamel.dll here as 2025\BIMCamel.dll.

A DLL built against a different Navisworks version will be rejected at load with:
    PLUGIN_LOAD_07: invalid referenced Navisworks Api version

You can delete this text file once the DLL is in place.
